fields.label: Department Name
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sDepartmentName FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Client
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 c.sClientName1 FROM tblDepartment d LEFT JOIN tblClient c ON c.lClientKey = d.lClientKey ORDER BY c.sClientName1

fields.label: Address
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(sMailAddr1, '') + ', ' + ISNULL(sMailCity, '') AS Address FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Contact Name
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(sContactFirst,'') + ' ' + ISNULL(sContactLast,''))) AS ContactName FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Phone
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sContactPhoneVoice FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Service Location
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sl.sServiceLocation FROM tblDepartment d LEFT JOIN tblServiceLocations sl ON sl.lServiceLocationKey = d.lServiceLocationKey ORDER BY d.sDepartmentName
fields.notes: VERIFY: tblServiceLocations join — check actual table/column names
